text: Make requireCommitBeforeCompact actually drive watchdog behavior
description: The autonomy policy now stores requireCommitBeforeCompact, but the watchdog prompt/runtime flow still hardcodes commit-before-compact behavior. Make the session/watchdog logic read and apply that policy explicitly.

status.comment: Implemented policy-driven watchdog behavior. Added 'compact' action to the state machine and updated all session wrappers. Supervisor prompts now explicitly instruct the LLM on whether a git commit is mandatory or optional before return to exploring, based on the requireCommitBeforeCompact policy.
